productDisplayName: Murcia Women Asjke Coffee Brown Handbags
description: If you want to make a style statement effortlessly, this brown shoulder bag from murcia will come in handy. The bag is large enough to accomodate all your essentials, plus it's so attractive that you will get apprecaitive glances all day long. The versatile bag looks as great with casual outfits as it does with your formal wear. Time to take the office by storm, and be the coolest chick at the mall too! Made of leather for enhanced durability and style Two roomy zippered compartments with inner zippered pocket to hold essentials Small zippered compartment at the front and back for stowing essentials Contrast thread detailing for added attraction Adjustable belt on the sides Two padded short handles for ease of carrying and extra comfort Metal loops for the handles with stud detailing for added style Genuine leather badge on the front Branded zippers and sliders for easy useBag careRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirtUse a mild leather cleaner
